summary: Tested Structured Verbal Findings form and Nested Job Modal features. Fixed 1 critical backend bug (StoneResponse model couldn't handle dict verbal_findings). All features working correctly after fix.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: StoneResponse model verbal_findings field typed as Optional[str] but API returns dict when structured findings are saved, causing 500 Internal Server Error on GET /jobs
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed verbal_findings type from 'Optional[str]' to 'Optional[Union[str, Dict[str, Any]]]' to support both legacy string and new structured dict formats

issues: Minor React warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - cosmetic only

context_for_next_testing_agent: Structured verbal findings form fully working. Job #17 has stones with saved structured findings. Dropdowns populated from backend settings API. Nested job modal in shipments shows View Full button and certificate grouping.

test_flows_completed.feature: Verbal Findings - Certificate ID text input
test_flows_completed.details: Input field present with data-testid='verbal-certificate-id', accepts text input
Weight field pre-filled with stone's weight, editable
Dropdown populated with 35+ values including NATURAL RUBY, NATURAL SAPPHIRE, NATURAL EMERALD, etc.
Dropdown populated with 35+ values including VIVID RED PIGEON BLOOD, VIVID BLUE ROYAL BLUE, etc.
Dropdown populated with 19 values including BURMA (MYANMAR), SRI LANKA, KASHMIR (INDIA), COLOMBIA, etc.
Dropdown populated with 22 values including NO INDICATION OF TREATMENT, HEATED, H(a), H(b), etc.
Save Verbal Findings button works, data persists correctly in backend

test_flows_completed.feature: Nested Job Modal - View Full button
test_flows_completed.details: View Full button present in nested job modal in Shipments page
Certificate groups displayed correctly with header row 'Certificate X (N stones)' and Cert badges

test_flows_completed.feature: Nested Job Modal - Stone click opens dialog
test_flows_completed.details: Clicking stone in nested job modal opens stone dialog (3-level stack works)

backend_api_tests.GET /api/settings/dropdowns: PASS - Returns all 4 dropdown fields with populated options
backend_api_tests.POST /api/settings/dropdowns/initialize: PASS - Idempotent initialization of default values
backend_api_tests.PUT /api/stones/{id}/verbal with structu: PASS - Saves structured verbal findings correctly
backend_api_tests.GET /api/jobs - with structured verbal_f: PASS - Returns structured findings as dict (after fix)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/shipments with job_ids: PASS - Returns job IDs for nested modal fetching
